entries.title: The ‘Father of the Internet’ is finally retiring
entries.description: Vinton Cerf, one of the creators of the protocols underlying the internet, will step down as Google's chief internet evangelist next week.

entries.title: Trump drops restrictions on Anthropic’s Mythos and Fable models
entries.description: The Trump administration's erratic approach to AI policymaking has left companies across the industry with little clarity about what will govern future model releases.

entries.title: Wayve launches $85M employee tender offer at $8.5B valuation
entries.description: Wayve’s offering is part of a growing trend of AI startups using employee tenders as a strategic tool to attract and retain talent.

entries.title: OpenClaw is finally available on Android and iOS
entries.description: The free open source agentic program is finally invading your phone.

entries.title: The DeepMind trio who built a poker AI are now making money for quant hedge funds
entries.description: EquiLibre Technologies, a Prague-based AI lab founded by three ex-DeepMind researchers, is now valued at more than $500 million.

entries.title: Google introduces a faster, cheaper image generator with Nano Banana 2 Lite
entries.description: Google is updating its image generator to make it faster and cheaper, making it a more useful tool for creators looking to make AI content.

entries.title: Nvidia competitor Etched hits $5B valuation, $1B in sales for AI chip
entries.description: Nvidia AI chip competitor Etched says it has already booked $1 billion under contract for the inference systems powered by its chip.

entries.title: Anthropic launches Claude Sonnet 5 as a cheaper way to run agents
entries.description: Anthropic’s Claude Sonnet 5 brings stronger agentic capabilities, lower pricing, and improved safety, positioning the model as a cheaper alternative to Opus, GPT-5.5, and Gemini Pro.

entries.title: Acti puts AI agents directly into your smartphone keyboard
entries.description: Acti is betting the smartphone keyboard is the next home for AI assistants. The startup's new keyboard for iOS and Android works across apps and lets users create custom AI-powered shortcuts using nat

entries.title: Anthropic’s Claude Science bets on workflow, not a new model, to win over scientists
entries.description: Anthropic's Claude Science is a workbench that gives scientists one environment to do computational research, saving them from the need to bounce between databases, pipelines, and tools.

entries.title: X now offers an MCP server to make its platform easier for AI tools to use
entries.description: X has launched a hosted MCP server, making it easier for developers to connect AI applications with the company’s API.

entries.title: Podcasting platform Riverside enters the newsletter publishing game
entries.description: Users will be able use AI to create newsletters based on their recordings.

entries.title: Amazon launches new $1 billion FDE org, following OpenAI and Anthropic
entries.description: Engineers on the new team will embed within companies to deploy purpose-built agents, focusing on fast deployments and customer self-sufficiency.

entries.title: Lumo, Proton’s privacy-focused AI chatbot, gets an upgrade
entries.description: Proton's Lumo 2.0 is dropping this week, giving users a broader variety of capabilities.

entries.title: Crypto exchange OKX wants AI agents to hire and pay each other
entries.description: OKX is bringing together payments, identity, and reputation into a marketplace for AI agents.

entries.title: The AI jobs debate just got messier
entries.description: A new report finds "high-intensity AI adopters” saw headcount increase 10.2%. Among those companies, entry-level headcount rose by 12%, countering the rhetoric that AI kills junior jobs.

entries.title: Vibe-coding platform Base44 launches own model as AI startups seek defensibility
entries.description: Wix-owned vibe-coding platform Base44 has started rolling out its own AI model — with hopes that it will eventually outperform frontier models.

entries.title: Gemini’s personalized AI image generation is now free for US users
entries.description: Google is expanding Gemini’s personalized AI image generation to eligible free users in the U.S., allowing the chatbot to create images based on your interests and data from connected Google apps.

entries.title: Anthropic and Gov. Newsom forge deal allowing California government to use Claude at half price
entries.description: As Anthropic forges a closer relationship with the state of California, the federal government has made an enemy out of the OpenAI rival.

entries.title: South Korean tech giants commit over $550B to ease ‘RAMageddon’
entries.description: The world's two largest memory chip companies vow to build more memory lab fabs as South Korea positions itself as an AI tech powerhouse country.
